events.title: Iranian Strikes on Prince Sultan Air Base
events.desc: Iran launched drones and missiles targeting Prince Sultan Air Base in Saudi Arabia, destroying an E-3 Sentry and damaging multiple KC-135 tankers. This marks a significant escalation in Iran's asymmetric counterair campaign against U.S. and allied assets in the region.
events.location: Prince Sultan Air Base, Saudi Arabia

events.title: Israeli Airstrike in Gaza
events.desc: An Israeli airstrike hit a police checkpoint in Bureij camp, central Gaza Strip, killing at least six people and injuring several others. This strike is part of ongoing operations against Hamas-led police forces.

events.title: Lebanon Mourns Security Forces Killed in Israeli Strike
events.desc: Lebanon held funeral ceremonies for 13 members of its State Security agency who were killed in an Israeli strike. This incident highlights the escalating conflict and casualties in the region.

events.title: US Military Operations to Clear Strait of Hormuz
events.desc: President Trump announced via social media that the U.S. military has begun clearing operations in the Strait of Hormuz and that all Iranian minelaying ships have been sunk, indicating a significant kinetic engagement aimed at restoring maritime passage.

events.title: US Scattering Mines over Iranian Village
events.desc: Evidence suggests the U.S. deployed the Gator Scatterable Mine system over Kafari, a village near Shiraz, Iran. This action resulted in casualties and represents a direct kinetic action against Iranian territory.

events.title: Israeli Strikes in Lebanon Following Ceasefire Announcement
events.desc: Hours after a US-Iran ceasefire was announced, Israel launched a large wave of strikes across Lebanon, including Beirut and southern areas. The attacks resulted in significant casualties, with the Lebanese health ministry reporting at least 182 killed.

events.title: Deadly Chad Strike Linked to Sudanese RSF Weaponry
events.desc: Munition remnants from a strike in Tiné, Chad, which killed at least 17 people, appear to match weapons previously used by Sudan's Rapid Support Forces (RSF), despite denials of involvement.

events.title: Hungarian Government Passwords Exposed Online
events.desc: Approximately 800 Hungarian government email addresses and their passwords have been leaked online, compromising security protocols for ministries involved in sensitive work. This breach affects 12 out of 13 ministries.

events.title: US-Iran Ceasefire Talks Begin in Pakistan
events.desc: High-level negotiations between the United States and Iran to end the Middle East war have commenced in Islamabad, Pakistan. The talks are facilitated by Pakistan and aim to address key issues following a fragile ceasefire.

events.title: France Discusses Iran Ceasefire and Ukraine with Turkey
events.desc: French President Emmanuel Macron stated that he discussed the ongoing Iran ceasefire talks and the situation in Ukraine with Turkish President Tayyip Erdogan, indicating diplomatic engagement on multiple regional and international crises.

events.title: US and Iran Set for Peace Talks Amid Doubts
events.desc: Negotiations between the U.S. and Iran are scheduled to take place in Islamabad, Pakistan, with the aim of ending the six-week war. However, Tehran has raised concerns, stating talks cannot proceed without commitments on Lebanon and sanctions relief.

events.title: Iran's Internet Blackout During Strikes
events.desc: During Israeli and American strikes, Iran's government imposed a near-total internet blackout, reducing traffic by 98%. This action was deliberate, aimed at controlling information flow to the Iranian populace rather than a result of the attacks on military installations.

events.title: Lebanon and Israel Officials to Meet in US
events.desc: A senior Lebanese official indicated that Lebanon would only participate in peace talks with Israel if a ceasefire is in place, highlighting a key condition for de-escalation.

events.title: Palestinian Shot Dead During Israeli Settler Attack
events.desc: A Palestinian was killed during an attack by Israeli settlers in the occupied West Bank. This incident occurs amidst warnings from ex-security chiefs about uncontrolled "government sponsored Jewish terrorism."

events.title: Iran's New Supreme Leader Injured in Strike
events.desc: Sources close to Iran's inner circle report that the new Supreme Leader, Mojtaba Khamenei, is still recovering from severe facial and leg injuries sustained in the airstrike that killed his father at the start of the war.
